Grid.TextBlock:
EXECUTION MESSAGE
To the men of Strike Group MOLNIYA: I have received word that the Americans have dispatched the USS Enterprise carrier battle group to hunt for us. This fact alone is a great victory for the Soviet Union! This means that our small force has inflicted such great damage upon NATO that they have been forced to allocate one of their precious carriers to find us.
Our continued survival now depends on disciplined maneuver and precise execution. Fleet Headquarters has brokered an agreement for our force to proceed toward neutral India, but this transit requires passing through the central Indian Ocean, where our detection is likely. When we are detected, we must strike with overwhelming force!
Intelligence reporting indicates that USS Enterprise is operating with reduced fuel and aviation stores and has detached USS CAMDEN to rendezvous with logistics elements west of Diego Garcia. We will take advantage of this situation to sink this ship.
American practice is to protect their underway resupply groups with destroyers and the Viking aircraft. We should also expect that their base at Diego Garcia may send Orion and Phantom jets if we are detected. We are joined by our Comrades aboard the missile submarine K-184, which has been attached to our force for the duration.
We will locate and destroy USS Camden, then disengage before the American carriers can respond. Success will buy time for us to reach India, where we shall live to fight another day!
Good luck, Comrades.
END OF MESSAGE
/s/ Markov
Cовершенно cекретно
После прочтения — уничтожить
